title: poa sylvatica var. longifolia
intro: Poa sylvatica var. longifolia, also known as tall meadow-grass or long-leaved meadow-grass, is a variety of the Poa sylvatica species, a type of grass that is native to the UK and Ireland. This plant has been used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other compounds. The health benefits of Poa sylvatica var. longifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health, as well as its possible role in protecting against oxidative stress and cell damage. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made from its dried leaves and flowers, which can be infused in hot water or used as a tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
